title: pteris cadieri var. hainanensis
intro: Pteris cadieri var. hainanensis, also known as Hainan fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the Pteris genus. It is used in traditional medicine in southern China, particularly in the Hainan province, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pteris cadieri var. hainanensis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Pteris cadieri var. hainanensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
